block_00: How to Break Into the Crypto Market
block_01: Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies caught the eyes of many investors during their period of record-breaking growth in 2017. Traders may still find some opportunities in the Crypto market as long as they are aware of the risks involved. Here’s what you need to know in a nutshell.
block_03: Contracts for Difference (CFDs) are an agreement between two parties to exchange the difference in price of an asset from the time a trade is opened to the time it is closed.
block_04: With Crypto CFD trading, you can speculate on the price of a cryptocurrency without owning the actual asset.
block_09: How to trade CFDs on Crypto
block_10: Choose the crypto you would like to trade
block_11: Buy the asset if you think it will increase in price. Sell if you speculate it will depreciate.
block_12: Close the deal when the time is right or you may set up auto close.
block_13: When trading CFDs on crypto, keep in mind:
block_15: smart news feed for major events
block_16: that may move a crypto’s price
block_17: Some cryptocurrencies may be traded with leverage*
block_18: Use technical analysis tools to enhance your trading skills
block_19: Now that you know more about crypto trading, are you ready to give it a shot?
block_21: *Using leverage may increase the outcome of a trade but it also maximises losses.
